summary: All acceptance checks pass. SKILL.md now includes 互卦与体用 section with 生克 relationships, short conclusion expanded to 2-3 sentences, material-request length constraint removed, template restructured with 互卦/体用/六爻审之/依卦象所缺 framing, length limits increased (200-350/300-500), all four examples enriched, Solution Prohibition guardrail added, and README.md updated. Old phrases ('one or two sentences', '短断一句', standalone '请补') are fully removed. Only 2 files modified.

acceptance_checks: New 互卦与体用 section with derivation and 生克 instructions: pass - section at line 100, 体用生克 mentioned 6 times, all 4 生克 types listed
Short Conclusion Rule says 'two to three sentences': pass - line 123 confirms, 'one or two' fully removed
Material-request length constraint removed: pass - old constraint 0 matches, replaced with narrative-flow guidance
Template includes 互卦 and 体用 elements: pass - lines 201-212 include 互卦得, 体卦为/用卦为, 六爻审之, 依卦象所缺
Length limits increased to 200-350 / 300-500: pass - lines 219-220 confirm new limits
All four examples demonstrate richer format: pass - each example has 互卦得, 体卦为, 体用 label, 六爻审之, 依卦象所缺 framing
No forbidden phrases in new content: pass - all forbidden phrases only in listing section
Solution Prohibition guardrail for expanded content: pass - line 240 explicitly covers 互卦/体用/生克
findings: low: Example 4 line 338 has a Unicode quotation mark inconsistency — the opening quote of 突然不行 uses U+201D (RIGHT DOUBLE QUOTATION MARK) instead of expected U+201C (LEFT DOUBLE QUOTATION MARK). Cosmetic, does not affect function or readability.

info: No executable test suite exists in the repository; all verification is static content review. AI model behavior with the enriched 互卦/体用 content cannot be validated in this environment, as noted by both analyst and implementer.
info: All 6 '请补：' grep matches derive from '依卦象所缺，请补：' — no standalone '请补：' remains, confirming the old abrupt material-request pattern is fully replaced with closing divination language.
